description: 6 bifolia. These all appear to be literary except for the left folio of P5, which is a legal document concerning a real estate transaction. Dated: Tishrei 1437 Seleucid, which is 1125 CE. Concerning a house. Naming people such as Abū l-Fakhr; Abū l-Surūr al-Nassāl(?); ʿOvadya b. Efrayim ha-Levi (the seller); Elʿazar b. Yefet ha-Kohen (the buyer); and Abū ʿAlī. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
